title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Book Shop is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
